reason: Application source code is not present in this repository, so proposed remediation patches could not be applied and rescanned.

expected_after_state.expected_result: No string-built SQL using request input; parameterized query is used.
Untrusted output is HTML-encoded and CSP is configured.
Object lookup includes authenticated user ownership and denies cross-user access.
Shell interpretation is removed and IP input is allowlist-validated.
Uploads are MIME-allowlisted, renamed, and stored outside the web root.
Login endpoint has rate limiting, generic errors, logging, and short-lived tokens.
Public version disclosure is removed and dependency scanning blocks high-risk packages.
